title: fix: route qwen tts simple audio requests
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Qwen finds its voice
gist.blurb: Fixed a routing hiccup where simple audio requests for Qwen TTS were getting lost on their way to ElevenLabs. Now, your Qwen text-to-speech requests will hit the right endpoint every time.
gist.summary: Fixed an API routing bug to ensure simple `/audio/{text}` requests for Qwen TTS models are correctly handled by the Qwen provider instead of falling back to ElevenLabs.
gist.impact: Users requesting Qwen TTS models via the simple audio endpoint will now reliably receive the correct model's output.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about routing audio requests correctly. Visual metaphor: Polly the bee acting as a switchboard operator, routing sound waves or musical notes to the correct chunky retro speaker.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny vintage headset, operating a retro switchboard that routes glowing musical notes into a chunky wooden speaker. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
